/usr/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -Wl,--no-dynamic-linker -Wl,-pie -Wl,-znocombreloc -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/vboot/vboot.ld CMakeFiles/vboot.elf.dir/crt0.S.obj CMakeFiles/vboot.elf.dir/main.c.obj -o ../vboot.elf
